briefdescription.para: EDID IIC slave address.
EDID total size in bytes.
EDID block size.
EDID word size in bytes.
Clock Wizard software reset register offset.
Clock Wizard software reset value.
Clock Wizard status register offset.
Clock Wizard interrupt status register offset.
Clock Wizard interrupt enable register offset.
Clock Wizard reconfiguration register offset.
Clock Wizard reconfiguration value.
Clock Wizard register 1 offset.
Clock Wizard register 2 offset.
Clock Wizard register 3 offset.
Clock Wizard register 4 offset.
Clock Wizard register 12 offset.
Clock Wizard register 13 offset.
Clock Wizard register 11 offset.
Clock Wizard register 11 value.
Clock Wizard register 14 offset.
Clock Wizard register 14 value.
Clock Wizard register 15 offset.
Clock Wizard register 15 value.
Clock Wizard register 16 offset.
Clock Wizard register 16 value.
Clock Wizard register 17 offset.
Clock Wizard register 17 value.
Clock Wizard register 19 offset.
Clock Wizard register 25 offset.
Clock Wizard register 26 offset.
Clock Wizard register 26 value.
Clock Wizard lock bit.
Clock Wizard register 3 pre-divider 2 bit.
Clock Wizard register 3 used bit.
Clock Wizard register 3 MX bit.
Clock Wizard register 1 pre-divider 2 bit.
Clock Wizard register 1 enable bit.
Clock Wizard register 1 MX bit.
Clock Wizard reconfiguration load bit.
Clock Wizard reconfiguration start address bit.
Clock Wizard register 1 edge mask.
Clock Wizard CLKOUT0 pre-divider 2 shift.
Clock Wizard CLKOUT0 MX shift.
Clock Wizard CLKOUT0 P5 enable shift.
Clock Wizard CLKOUT0 P5 falling edge shift.
Clock Wizard register 12 edge shift.
M value for 4.05 Gbps link rate.
M value for 2.70 Gbps link rate.
M value for 1.35 Gbps link rate.
M value for 0.81 Gbps link rate.
D value for all link rates.
Clock Wizard status check retry count.
Clock Wizard status check wait time in microseconds.
VBlank interrupt disable threshold.
This function reports list of cores included in DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the downstream topology that will be used by the DisplayPort RX to respond to down requests coming from the TX.

listitem.para: Sinks equal to number of streams (each with its own global unique identifier) are exposed to LINK_ADDRESS sideband messages.

The extended display identification data (EDID) will be set to a generic EDID (GenEdid) for each of the sinks. REMOTE_I2C_READ sideband messages on address 0x50 will be replied to with the contents set by XDp_RxSetIicMapEntry for 0x50.
REMOTE_DPCD_READ sideband messages will be responded to with the contents set for the sink using XDp_RxSetDpcdMap. All sinks are given the a generic DPCD (GenDpcd).
ENUM_PATH_RESOURCES sideband messages will be responded to with the value set by XDp_RxMstSetPbn (or 0 if the sink already has a stream allocated to it).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables all training related interrupts for the DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

simplesect.para: This is a common operation used during initialization and after unplug events.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous training pattern 1 interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: On initialization, training pattern 1 interrupt handler is set to this callback. It is considered as an training pattern 1 for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous training pattern 2 interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: On initialization, training pattern 2 interrupt handler is set to this callback. It is considered as an training pattern 2 for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous unplug interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: On initialization, unplug interrupt handler is set to this callback. It is considered as an unplug for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous access lane set interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: On initialization, access lane set interrupt handler is set to this callback.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: Stub callback function for DisplayPort training done event.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called when DisplayPort link training is completed. It resets the Display Timing Generator (DTG) by disabling and then re-enabling it to ensure proper synchronization with the newly trained link parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XDpRxSs instance. Must be a valid pointer to an XDpRxSs structure, otherwise an assertion failure will occur.

simplesect.para: This is a static stub function intended to be used as a default callback handler for training done events.
The function assumes the InstancePtr is properly initialized.

briefdescription.para: Stub callback function for handling training lost events in DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: This function serves as a default callback handler when DisplayPort link training is lost. It generates an HPD (Hot Plug Detect) interrupt and disables audio output to properly handle the loss of link training.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XDpRxSs instance. This pointer is cast to XDpRxSs type internally and must not be NULL.

simplesect.para:
This function performs the following actions:
Validates that the instance pointer is not NULL using assertion
Generates a 750us HPD interrupt pulse to signal the source
Disables audio output in the DisplayPort RX Subsystem
The InstancePtr parameter must be a valid pointer to an XDpRxSs structure, otherwise an assertion failure will occur in debug builds.

briefdescription.para: This function is the stub callback for VBlank interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: Driver invokes user callback, then conditionally disables interrupt based on VBlankCount threshold to prevent excessive interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: Disables VBLANK interrupt after VBlankCount exceeds threshold.

briefdescription.para: This function is the stub callback for InfoPacket interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: Driver invokes user callback which manages packet processing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: User callback manages frame_count and interrupt disable logic.

briefdescription.para: This function is the stub callback for Payload Allocation interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: Driver enables ACT_RX interrupt after invoking user callback for MST setup.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: Enables ACT_RX interrupt for MST stream synchronization.

briefdescription.para: This function is the stub callback for NoVideo interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: Driver performs interrupt management operations before invoking user callback.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: Enables VBLANK and INFO_PKT interrupts needed after video loss.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the decoder clock for the DP RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the core includes setting up the instance data and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if sub-core not found.
XST_FAILURE if sub-core initialization failed.
XST_SUCCESS if XDpRxSs_CfgInitialize successful.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem including all sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: IIC needs to be reinitialized after reset.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem including all sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if DP RX Subsystem and its included sub-cores configured successfully.
XST_FAILURE, otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This static function sets the EDID data to the EDID memory.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function setup the DisplayPort Receiver Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is a pointer to the XDpRxSs_UserConfig instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDpRxSs *InstancePtr, u16 Lane0, u16 Lane1, u16 Lane2, u16 Lane3)
memberdef.name: DpRxSs_UpdatePrbsErrCouters

briefdescription.para: This function updates the PRBS error counters of DpRxss.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.
is PRBS error counter value of Lane0.
is PRBS error counter value of Lane1.
is PRBS error counter value of Lane2.
is PRBS error counter value of Lane3.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the data rate to be used by the DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

is the rate at which link needs to be driven.
XDPRXSS_LINK_BW_SET_162GBPS = 0x06(for a 1.62 Gbps data rate)
XDPRXSS_LINK_BW_SET_270GBPS = 0x0A(for a 2.70 Gbps data rate)
XDPRXSS_LINK_BW_SET_540GBPS = 0x14(for a 5.40 Gbps data rate)

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if setting the new lane rate was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the number of lanes to be used by DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

is the number of lanes to be used.
1 = XDPRXSS_LANE_COUNT_SET_1
2 = XDPRXSS_LANE_COUNT_SET_2
4 = XDPRXSS_LANE_COUNT_SET_4

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if setting the new lane count was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function allows the user to select number of ports to be exposed when replying to a LINK_ADDRESS sideband message and hides rest of the ports.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
specifies the number of ports to be exposed within the range 1 to 4.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if ports exposed successfully.
XST_FAILURE, if exposing ports which are already exposed or ports are exceeding total number of stream supported by the system.

simplesect.para: Number of ports are equal to number of streams.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the receiver's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) indicates that the receiver has achieved clock recovery, channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment for all lanes currently in use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the RX device has achieved clock recovery, channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the number of pixels output through the user data interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the user pixel width to be configured.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the bits per color from MISC0 or VSC SDP packet based on whether reception of colorimetry information through VSC SDP packets or through MISC registers of the stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the stream number to make the calculations for.

simplesect.para: The bits per color for the stream.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the incoming video stream is Progressive or Interlace mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the stream number to make the calculations for.

simplesect.para: Video timing is Progressive or Interlace.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the color component format from MISC0 or VSC SDP packet based on whether reception of colorimetry information through VSC SDP packets or through MISC registers of the stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the stream number to make the calculations for.

simplesect.para: The color component for the stream.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the YCbCrColorimetry from MISC0 or VSC SDP packet based on whether reception of colorimetry information through VSC SDP packets or through MISC registers of the stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the stream number to make the calculations for.

simplesect.para: The colorimetry format for the stream.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the dynamic range from MISC0 or VSC SDP packet based on whether reception of colorimetry information through VSC SDP packets or through MISC registers of the stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
is the stream number to make the calculations for.

simplesect.para: The dynamic range value for the stream.

briefdescription.para: This function gives the main stream attributes (MSA).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the VideoStream Parameters from the incoming video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

Pointer to an XVidC_VideoStream structure that will be populated with the extracted video stream information for the requested stream. On success, this function updates (at minimum) the following fields:
Timing, FrameRate, VmId
PixPerClk (derived from lane count)
ColorDepth, ColorFormatId, ColorStd, DynamicRange
BaseFrameRate, BaseTiming, UncompressedTiming
IsInterlaced
Stream is the stream number to get the Video data.

listitem.para: SUCCESS when video data extraction is success

briefdescription.para: This function handles incoming sideband messages.

detaileddescription.para: It will 1) Read the contents of the down request registers, 2) Delegate control depending on the request type, and 3) Send a down reply.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the entire message was sent successfully.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no device is connected.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if sending one of the message fragments timed out.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function handles ACT (Allocation Change Trigger) received interrupt.

detaileddescription.para: It performs driver-level interrupt management for MST stream changes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: This is a driver-level function that manages interrupt enables/disables when ACT sequence is received for MST payload allocation changes.

briefdescription.para: This function sets Adaptive-Sync capabilities to DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.
is to enable/disable the Adaptive-Sync capabilities in DisplayPort Rx Subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function masks the Adaptive-Sync interrupts from DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.
is a variable contains of Masked value

briefdescription.para: This function unmasks Adaptive-Sync interrupt from DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.
to unmask

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current vblank value of the incoming video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
Stream is the stream number to get the vblank.

listitem.para: The current vblank value

simplesect.para: This function has to be called after assertion of Bit-30 of XDP_RX_INTERRUPT_CAUSE_2 register

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current VTotal value of the incoming video stream.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XDpRxSs core instance.
Stream
is the stream number to get the vtotal.
Note: This function has to be called after assertion Bit-30 of XDP_RX_INTERRUPT_CAUSE_2 register

listitem.para: The current VTotal value

simplesect.para: This function has to be called after assertion of Bit-30 of XDP_RX_INTERRUPT_CAUSE_2 register

briefdescription.para: This function waits for the decoder clock to lock.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if clock is locked, XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Enable/Disable MST mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.
is to Enable/Disable Mst mode.

simplesect.para: If Mst mode is disabled, DpRxss will be in SST mode.

briefdescription.para: Get the current link rate from DPCD register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Link rate value read from DPCD_LINK_BW_SET register.
